place: Bo Phut, Ko Samui District, Surat Thani, Thailand
title: Hillside Sea-View Villa with Two Pools - Bo Phut
blurb: A contemporary four-bedroom villa set into the Bo Phut hills, designed around uninterrupted Gulf of Thailand views, multiple infinity pools and full smart-home automation. Around 700 m² of built area on a ~1,000 m² freehold plot — one of only two villas. Off-plan, completing December 2026. ฿48,000,000.
detail:
Set within the lush hills of Bo Phut, this is one of only two contemporary villas in an exclusive hillside release — a residence designed around privacy, technology and uninterrupted sea views. Every room is positioned to capture the panorama of the Gulf of Thailand, in one of Koh Samui's most established luxury addresses.

The architecture is open and light-filled, with expansive open-plan living framed by floor-to-ceiling glass so the sea becomes the centrepiece of the home. Premium materials — large-format ceramic, feature stone walls and custom solid-wood doors — give the interiors a refined, timeless character, flowing out to broad terraces, sun decks and an outdoor rain shower above the pools.

Living and entertaining spaces are generous and seamless: a designer kitchen with custom cabinetry, natural-stone countertops and European appliance packages, opening to dining and lounge areas that overlook the ocean. Multiple infinity pools and landscaped tropical gardens wrap the residence.

The villa is fully automated — an integrated smart-home system with smartphone control of lighting, air-conditioning and security, high-speed fibre infrastructure, and sustainable options including solar-ready wiring, rainwater collection and whole-house water filtration.

The Bo Phut hillside sits minutes from Fisherman's Village and its restaurants, cafés and beaches, with easy access to Bangrak and Plai Laem and roughly fifteen minutes to Samui International Airport. Offered freehold and off-plan — construction began May 2025, with completion scheduled for December 2026 — at ฿48,000,000.

features.l: Freehold — one of only two villas
